_comment: IMP-146 opt-in: copy the 'hooks' block into your local .claude/settings.local.json (not versioned). Requires Claude Code with Agent-hook support; see .claude/hooks/README.md for the fallback.

hooks.prompt: A governed Ignite Sentinel artifact was just written or edited: $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH. Verify it per your instructions and report VERIFIED or BLOCKED with cited findings. Only act if the path matches workspaces/*/02_requirements/project-brief.md, workspaces/*/03_specs/*.md or workspaces/*/04_backlog/*.md; otherwise reply SKIPPED (not a governed artifact).
